title: WU-15: Frontend Tests (Vitest + RTL)
description: LoginPage.test.tsx: renders fields, validation errors, API call on valid submit. useLogin.test.ts: success stores token+navigates, 401 returns error. ProtectedRoute.test.tsx: redirects unauthenticated, renders authenticated. Depends on WU-13, WU-14, WU-11.

title: WU-14: Routing Setup
description: Configure React Router in src/App.tsx: /login→LoginPage, /customers→stub, /forgot-password→stub, /→redirect to /customers. Wrap protected routes with ProtectedRoute. Depends on WU-12, WU-13.

title: WU-13: Login Page UI and Form Wiring
description: Create src/pages/Login/LoginPage.tsx. Split-panel MUI layout, React Hook Form wiring, validation errors, useLogin mutation call, API error display, loading state on button. Depends on WU-11, WU-12.

title: WU-12: Protected Route
description: Create src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx. Redirect to /login if not authenticated. Pass through children if authenticated. Depends on WU-10.

title: WU-11: useLogin Hook
description: Create src/hooks/useLogin.ts using useMutation. On success: store token, update auth context, navigate to /customers. On 401: return 'Invalid email or password'. Depends on WU-10.

title: WU-10: Auth Context
description: Create src/context/AuthContext.tsx with state {user,roles,token,isAuthenticated}. Rehydrate from storage on mount. Expose logout(). Wrap app in AuthProvider in main.tsx. Depends on WU-09.

title: WU-09: Auth API and Token Storage (Frontend)
description: Create src/api/auth.ts with loginApi(). Token storage helper (localStorage/sessionStorage). Axios instance with base URL + Bearer token interceptor. Can start in parallel with backend WUs.

title: WU-08: Backend Unit Tests (nUnit)
description: LoginCommandHandlerTests: valid login, wrong password, unknown user, RememberMe expiry. LoginCommandValidatorTests: empty fields, invalid email, short password. Covers 80% threshold. Depends on WU-05.

title: WU-07: Permission Authorization Handler
description: Create PermissionRequirement wrapping ActionKey. Implement PermissionAuthorizationHandler checking role claims. Register named policies (customers.view, customers.edit) in Program.cs. Depends on WU-06.

title: WU-06: AuthController and JWT Middleware
description: Create AuthController with POST /api/auth/login. Rate limiting 10req/min. Map DTO to LoginCommand via MediatR. Return 200 with token or 401. Configure AddAuthentication(JwtBearer)+AddAuthorization in Program.cs. Depends on WU-05.

title: WU-05: LoginCommand CQRS (Command+Handler+Validator)
description: Create LoginCommand record (EmailOrUsername,Password,RememberMe), LoginCommandResult, LoginCommandValidator (FluentValidation), LoginCommandHandler (resolve user, verify BCrypt, load roles, call JwtService). Depends on WU-03, WU-04.

title: WU-04: User Repository
description: Define IUserRepository with GetByEmailAsync, GetByUsernameAsync, GetWithRolesAsync. Implement UserRepository using EF Core. Register in DI. Depends on WU-02.

title: WU-03: JWT Service
description: Define IJwtService interface with GenerateToken(user,roles,rememberMe). Implement JwtService embedding userId,email,roles as claims. Configure appsettings.json Jwt:Key/Issuer/Audience/ExpiryMinutes. Register in DI. Depends on WU-01.

title: WU-02: EF Core DbContext, Migration, Seed
description: Create AppDbContext with DbSets for all entities. Code-first migration InitialLoginSchema. Seed Admin/Sales/Viewer roles and permissions (customers.view, customers.edit). Depends on WU-01.

title: WU-01: Domain Entities (User, Role, Permission, junctions)
description: Create CRM.Domain entities: User (Id,Email,Username,PasswordHash,IsActive,CreatedAt), Role (Id,Name), Permission (Id,Name,ActionKey), UserRole junction, RolePermission junction. No dependencies on other WUs.

title: 001-login: Login Module Implementation
description: Implement the full login/auth module for the CRM. Covers domain entities, EF Core, JWT, CQRS LoginCommand, AuthController, permission RBAC, React auth context, login page UI, and tests. Spec: specs/001-login/spec.md
